SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-14-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-14-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT JONELLE RODERICKS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT/CROSS COMPLAINANT CHENGRUN YU IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY NON-CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER JOHNNY CHAU. PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT WAIVES ANY SERVICE ISSUES. THE NON-CERTIFIED INTERPRETER WAS GIVEN THE INTERPRETER'S OATH BY CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
